user.title: Kohler Konnect
user.description: Enter your Kohler Konnect account credentials. The APIM subscription key is pre-filled with the app's default; leave it unless Kohler support tells you otherwise.

signin.title: Sign in to Kohler

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Kohler Konnect
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Kohler sign-in needs to be renewed. Open this link, sign in, and paste the resulting `msauth://...` address below:

{signin_url}

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your credentials and APIM key, then try again.
error.signin_failed: Sign-in could not be completed. Make sure you pasted the full msauth:// address, then try again.
error.no_devices: No devices found on this account.
